## Summary

## Tests

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test -- --run`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Checklist

- [ ] Behavior changes have tests.
- [ ] Import/export schema impact is described, if relevant.
- [ ] Documentation is updated, if relevant.
- [ ] The change preserves local-first behavior and avoids diagnosis or crisis guidance.
